zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun於1195年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌時，他的父親Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun11192歲，母親Adelicia Nevers21歲。他於大約1209年與Mabile結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1249年2月13日在法國崔艾-吉洛易享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun于1195年出生在法国藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌时，他的父亲Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun11192岁，母亲Adelicia Nevers21岁。他于大约1209年与Mabile结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1249年2月13日在法国崔艾-吉洛易享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun was born in 1195, in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun, was 11192 and his mother, Adelicia Nevers, was 21. He married Mabile about 1209. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 13 February 1249, in Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun est né en 1195, à Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun, avait 11192 ans et sa mère, Adelicia Nevers, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mabile environ 1209. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 13 février 1249, à Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun 1195 in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun 11192 und seine Mutter Adelicia Nevers 21. Er hat um 1209 Mabile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Februar 1249 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun è nato il nel 1195 nel Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun, aveva 11192 anni e il suo madre, Adelicia Nevers, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mabile circa 1209. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 febbraio 1249, nel Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudunが1195年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンアウドカーカソンで生まれた時，父Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudunは11192歳，母Adelicia Neversは21歳であった。約1209年にMabileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1249年2月13日にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun(이)가 1195년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 오드 카르캐손에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun(은)는 11192세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelicia Nevers(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1209년 Mabile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1249년 2월 13일 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun nasceu em 1195, em Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun, tinha 11192 anos e sua mãe, Adelicia Nevers, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabile aproximadamente 1209. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1249, em Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun родился в 1195 г. в местности каркассонн, ауд, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun было 11192 года, а матери, которую звали Adelicia Nevers, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabile около 1209 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 13 февраля 1249 г. в местности эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey VI Viscount de Chateaudun nació en 1195, en Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun, tenía 11192 años y su mamá, Adelicia Nevers, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mabile aproximadamente 1209. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de febrero de 1249, en Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
